title: Project build & dependency folders
_comment: Regenerable folders inside your CODE REPOS. The tool groups findings per project (one git repo = one project) so you can pick which repos to clean. 'scan.roots' are searched up to maxDepth; interior dirs named in 'prune' are skipped (this list also excludes tool/cache homes like ~/.npm, ~/.cargo, ~/.local so language caches, global npm, editor extensions and the like are never mistaken for your projects — those are covered by the dev-cache rules instead). kind:project entries only define the regenerable dir NAMES to match (and the method); they are deleted with rm. kind:gitignore enumerates every git-ignored entry via 'git ls-files --others --ignored --directory' per repo and moves them to the Trash (recoverable — git-ignored files can include local .env/config). Junk found outside any git repo is ignored. IMPORTANT: a name must NOT appear in both 'prune' and a category's 'dirs' — the find expression evaluates the prune branch first, so a pruned name can never be reported. Names matched as junk are pruned anyway (find does not descend into them), so moving a name out of 'prune' into 'dirs' costs no scan time.

categories.name: node_modules folders
categories.desc: Node dependency trees — restore with npm/pnpm/yarn install.

categories.name: JS/web build output
categories.desc: Bundler output (dist, build, out, .next, .nuxt, ...) — rebuilt by your build step.

categories.name: Rust / JVM build output
categories.desc: target/ trees (Cargo, Maven, sbt) and project-local Gradle state — rebuilt on next build.

categories.name: Python caches & virtualenvs
categories.desc: __pycache__, test/type-checker caches and project virtualenvs — recreate a venv with your usual install step.

categories.name: Apple / mobile build output
categories.desc: CocoaPods Pods/, SwiftPM .build/, project-local DerivedData, Expo & NDK output — restored by pod install / next build.

categories.name: Dart / Zig build output
categories.desc: Flutter/Dart .dart_tool and Zig cache/output — rebuilt on next build.

categories.name: Git-ignored files (all repos)
categories.desc: Everything 'git clean -ndX' would remove in each repo — MAY include local .env/config, so moved to Trash (recoverable).
